CustomField.formula: IF( Status__c = "Out of Stock", IMAGE( "https://spcreation2-dev-ed--c.develop.vf.force.com/resource/1775452421000/outer?", "Out of Stock", 20, 50 ), IMAGE( "https://spcreation2-dev-ed--c.develop.vf.force.com/resource/1775449714000/stampsto", "In Stock", 20, 50 ) )
CustomField.label: Flag
